Title: Regulation of plant Ni uptake by soil-borne microorganisms occurs independently of their Ni-solubilizing capabilities

Common_Genes.Source_Species: Arabidopsis thaliana ortholog referenced for Arabidopsis arenosa
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Microbial inoculum induced NRT2.1 expression in A. arenosa under Ni stress, associated with nutrient-transport fine-tuning rather than direct increase of Ni uptake in vitro.
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Root RNA-seq under Ni/Mn conditions with serpentine soil extract versus autoclaved extract; differential expression analysis
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. NRT2.1 was reported in the Discussion as induced in A. arenosa by serpentine microbiota. 2. Its induction was linked to serpentine adaptation and nutrient-transport fine-tuning under Ni stress. 3. The paper did not directly functionally validate NRT2.1 as causal for Ni accumulation.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Serpentine soil microbial extract inoculation; 500 µM Ni and 100 µM Mn in vitro
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Mentioned in the Abstract/Discussion as part of A. arenosa response, but not explicitly shown among the highlighted core transporter heatmap genes in the main text figures.
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Induced in roots upon serpentine microbiota inoculation under Ni stress

Common_Genes.Source_Species: Arabidopsis thaliana ortholog referenced for Arabidopsis arenosa
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Microbial inoculum induced NRT2.2 expression in A. arenosa under Ni stress, associated with nutrient-transport fine-tuning.
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Root RNA-seq under Ni/Mn conditions with serpentine soil extract versus autoclaved extract; differential expression analysis
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. NRT2.2 was described as upregulated in A. arenosa by serpentine microorganisms. 2. The gene was linked to serpentine adaptation and nutrient transport adjustments under Ni stress. 3. No direct reverse-genetic validation was provided.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Serpentine soil microbial extract inoculation; 500 µM Ni and 100 µM Mn in vitro
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Not experimentally dissected individually; included because the paper explicitly highlights NRT2.1/NRT2.2 in the species-specific response.
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Induced in roots upon serpentine microbiota inoculation under Ni stress

Regulation_Genes.Regulator_Type: metal transporter regulator-independent transporter treated here as regulatory-response focal gene
Regulation_Genes.Source_Species: Odontarrhena chalcidica ortholog annotated to Arabidopsis thaliana IRT1
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Upregulation correlates with enhanced Fe-transport machinery used for Ni acquisition
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Nickel uptake through iron transport pathway
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulation of IRT1 in O. chalcidica upon serpentine microbiota inoculation is associated with increased Ni uptake/hyperaccumulation.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Root RNA-seq; in vitro microbial inoculation under defined Ni/Mn conditions; plant Ni quantification; Ni fluorescence staining
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. IRT1 was upregulated in O. chalcidica roots by serpentine soil microorganisms. 2. This induction coincided with higher Ni accumulation despite unchanged Ni bioavailability in soil. 3. The study concludes that O. chalcidica relies on Fe-transport pathways for Ni acquisition.
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Serpentine soil extract inoculation; 500 µM Ni and 100 µM Mn
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Highlighted as a key induced transporter within the nickel cation transport category supporting Fe-pathway-mediated Ni uptake
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Functionally a transporter rather than a transcriptional regulator; included as a decisive core gene from Results because transporter induction is central to the causal model.
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Upregulated in roots after microbial inoculation under Ni stress

Regulation_Genes.Source_Species: Odontarrhena chalcidica ortholog annotated to Arabidopsis thaliana IRT2
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Induced as part of broader iron uptake machinery
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Nickel uptake through iron transport pathway
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulation of IRT2 accompanies microbiota-enhanced Ni uptake in O. chalcidica.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Root RNA-seq with microbial inoculation plus plant metal profiling
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. IRT2 ortholog expression increased in O. chalcidica roots after inoculation. 2. The induction supports use of Fe transport components in Ni acquisition. 3. No independent gene-specific functional assay was reported.
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Serpentine soil extract inoculation; 500 µM Ni and 100 µM Mn
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Part of the induced Fe-transporter set linked to elevated Ni uptake
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Transporter, not TF; categorized here as regulation-related only because the tool lacks a transporter-specific category beyond Common.
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Upregulated in roots after microbial inoculation under Ni stress

Regulation_Genes.Source_Species: Odontarrhena chalcidica ortholog annotated to Arabidopsis thaliana IREG1
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: Metal homeostasis modules for Ni handling
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Induced with iron homeostasis genes in inoculated O. chalcidica roots
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Cellular metal ion homeostasis under Ni stress
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Increased expression is associated with microbiota-supported Ni handling in O. chalcidica.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Root RNA-seq; inoculation experiments; Ni profiling
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. IREG1 ortholog was induced in inoculated O. chalcidica roots. 2. The induction formed part of the Fe-homeostasis signature associated with enhanced Ni uptake. 3. Direct causal dissection of IREG1 alone was not performed.
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Serpentine soil extract inoculation under Ni stress
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Supports the coordinated metal homeostasis program tied to hyperaccumulation

Regulation_Genes.Source_Species: Odontarrhena chalcidica ortholog annotated to Arabidopsis thaliana IREG2
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: Metal homeostasis modules for Ni handling
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Associated with microbiota-enhanced Ni uptake in O. chalcidica.
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. IREG2 ortholog expression increased after inoculation in O. chalcidica. 2. It belonged to the induced Fe-related transport/homeostasis signature. 3. Gene-specific validation was not reported.
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Serpentine soil extract inoculation under Ni stress
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Part of the coordinated transporter response underpinning Ni hyperaccumulation

Regulation_Genes.Regulator_Type: ferric reductase enzyme-like transporter support factor
Regulation_Genes.Source_Species: Odontarrhena chalcidica ortholog annotated to Arabidopsis thaliana FRO1
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: Fe acquisition machinery linked to Ni uptake
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Induced as part of Fe-response program
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Induction is associated with activation of Fe-transport pathway used for Ni uptake in O. chalcidica.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Root RNA-seq and Ni accumulation phenotyping
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. FRO1 ortholog was induced in inoculated O. chalcidica roots. 2. This supports activation of iron acquisition machinery during microbiota-enhanced Ni uptake. 3. No direct single-gene functional test was performed.
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Serpentine soil extract inoculation under Ni stress

Regulation_Genes.Regulator_Type: ferric reductase enzyme-like transporter support factor
Regulation_Genes.Source_Species: Odontarrhena chalcidica ortholog annotated to Arabidopsis thaliana FRO2
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: Fe acquisition machinery linked to Ni uptake
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Induced as part of Fe-response program
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Induction is associated with microbiota-enhanced Ni uptake in O. chalcidica.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Root RNA-seq and Ni accumulation phenotyping
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. FRO2 ortholog was induced in inoculated O. chalcidica roots. 2. This supports activation of iron acquisition machinery during microbiota-enhanced Ni uptake. 3. No direct single-gene functional test was performed.
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Serpentine soil extract inoculation under Ni stress

Regulation_Genes.Source_Species: Odontarrhena chalcidica ortholog annotated to Arabidopsis thaliana OPT3
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Induced in inoculated O. chalcidica roots
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Part of the induced Fe-transport signature associated with enhanced Ni uptake.
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. OPT3 ortholog was induced by serpentine microbiota in O. chalcidica roots. 2. It belongs to the Fe-homeostasis signature linked to Ni uptake. 3. No direct gene-specific functional validation was provided.
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Serpentine soil extract inoculation under Ni stress

Regulation_Genes.Source_Species: Odontarrhena chalcidica ortholog annotated to Arabidopsis thaliana BTS
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Induced as part of Fe-response signature associated with Ni acquisition
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: BTS induction accompanies microbiota-enhanced Fe-pathway activation linked to Ni uptake in O. chalcidica.
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. BTS ortholog was among genes induced in inoculated O. chalcidica roots. 2. The induction supports reprogramming of iron homeostasis during Ni uptake. 3. Causality was inferred from transcriptomic association rather than direct genetics.
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Serpentine soil extract inoculation under Ni stress

Regulation_Genes.Source_Species: Odontarrhena chalcidica ortholog annotated to Arabidopsis thaliana bHLH38
Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: Transcriptional activation within Fe deficiency response
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Induced as part of the Fe-response transcriptional program associated with Ni uptake
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Iron-homeostasis transcriptional control co-opted for Ni acquisition
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulation of bHLH38 is associated with activation of Fe-transport machinery supporting Ni uptake in O. chalcidica.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Root RNA-seq with inoculation; association with Ni accumulation phenotype
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. bHLH38 ortholog was induced in O. chalcidica roots by serpentine microbiota. 2. The study interprets this as activation of Fe-transport pathways used for Ni acquisition. 3. It is the clearest regulatory-gene component in the transcriptomic response, but no transactivation or knockout assay was performed.
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Serpentine soil extract inoculation under Ni stress
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Represents transcriptional reinforcement of the Fe-uptake network linked to Ni hyperaccumulation

Regulation_Genes.Source_Species: Odontarrhena chalcidica ortholog annotated to Arabidopsis thaliana NRAMP4
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Associated with microbiota-enhanced Ni handling in O. chalcidica.
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. NRAMP4 ortholog was induced in inoculated O. chalcidica roots. 2. This forms part of the transition metal transport response linked to enhanced Ni uptake. 3. No direct gene-level functional validation was provided.
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Serpentine soil extract inoculation under Ni stress

Regulation_Genes.Source_Species: Arabidopsis arenosa ortholog annotated to Arabidopsis thaliana ZIP4
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: Zn transport pathway under Ni stress
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Upregulated in A. arenosa in response to serpentine microbiota
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Cation partitioning and Zn-related transport adjustment under Ni stress
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: ZIP4 induction marks the A. arenosa strategy of transporter fine-tuning rather than enhanced Ni uptake.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Root RNA-seq under Ni/Mn conditions with microbial extract inoculation
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. ZIP4 was upregulated in A. arenosa roots after serpentine microbiota inoculation. 2. The response contrasted with Fe-transporter induction in O. chalcidica. 3. The paper interprets this as part of cation partitioning to mitigate Ni stress.
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Serpentine soil extract inoculation; 500 µM Ni and 100 µM Mn
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Illustrates species-specific transporter reprogramming associated with lower shoot Ni accumulation in A. arenosa

Regulation_Genes.Source_Species: Arabidopsis arenosa ortholog annotated to Arabidopsis thaliana ZIP10
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: Zn transport pathway under Ni stress
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Upregulated in A. arenosa in response to serpentine microbiota
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Cation partitioning and micronutrient transport adjustment
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: ZIP10 induction is associated with A. arenosa adaptation to Ni stress.
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. ZIP10 was among Zn transport genes induced in A. arenosa. 2. This contrasted with Fe transporter induction in O. chalcidica. 3. Direct functional validation was not performed.
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Serpentine soil extract inoculation under Ni stress

Regulation_Genes.Source_Species: Arabidopsis arenosa ortholog annotated to Arabidopsis thaliana ZIF1
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Upregulated in A. arenosa in response to serpentine microbiota
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: ZIF1 induction is associated with micronutrient partitioning responses in A. arenosa rather than direct Ni hyperaccumulation.
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. ZIF1 was upregulated in A. arenosa roots after inoculation. 2. The induction supports a Zn-related partitioning response. 3. No direct gene-specific manipulation was conducted.
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Serpentine soil extract inoculation under Ni stress
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: Major facilitator-type vacuolar transporter associated with Zn compartmentation

Regulation_Genes.Source_Species: Arabidopsis arenosa ortholog annotated to Arabidopsis thaliana HMA4
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Upregulated in A. arenosa in response to serpentine microbiota
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Transition metal ion transport and partitioning
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: HMA4 induction is associated with A. arenosa metal partitioning strategy under Ni stress.
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. HMA4 was induced in A. arenosa roots by serpentine microbiota. 2. The expression pattern supports a cation partitioning strategy distinct from O. chalcidica. 3. The study did not directly test HMA4 function here.
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Serpentine soil extract inoculation under Ni stress

Regulation_Genes.Source_Species: Arabidopsis arenosa ortholog annotated to Arabidopsis thaliana ZIP1
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: Zn transport pathway under Ni stress
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Upregulated in A. arenosa in response to serpentine microbiota
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: ZIP1 induction is associated with A. arenosa cation partitioning response under Ni stress.
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. ZIP1 was among the Zn transport genes induced in A. arenosa roots. 2. This differs from the Fe-transport induction observed in O. chalcidica. 3. Functional interpretation is based on transcriptome profiling.
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Serpentine soil extract inoculation under Ni stress
